headline: Royal Caribbean, Carnival Cruise Line raise a red flag
summary: Cruising has become a popular vacation option at least partly because of the value proposition it offers compared to a land-based vacation. Value is consistently among the top three reasons people board one of Royal Caribbean’s 68 ships, Royal Caribbean Group CFO Naftali Holtz told the Wall Street ...

headline: Royal Caribbean Cruises (RCL) Valuation Check After Recent Share Pullback And Mixed Return Profile
summary: Royal Caribbean Cruises stock in focus after recent share pullback Royal Caribbean Cruises (RCL) is back on many watchlists after a recent share pullback, with the stock down 9% over the past month and 19% over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Royal Caribbean Cruises. The recent pullback fits into a mixed picture, with the share price down over the past quarter but a 1-year total shareholder return of 3.41% and a very large 3-year total shareholder return above 200%.
